# MAS Monograms

> Custom embroidery studio in St. Matthews, SC. Mary Ann Stone has been doing monogramming and embroidery for decades. Every item is stitched to order — no mass production, no drop-shipping.

## Services

- [How It Works](https://mas-monograms.com/how-it-works/): The ordering process from request to finished item
- [Pricing](https://mas-monograms.com/pricing/): Per-piece rates by quantity, add-on options, rush orders
- [Request a Quote](https://mas-monograms.com/request-a-quote/): Start your order

## Shop by Item

- [Shop by Item](https://mas-monograms.com/shop-by-item/): Browse all item categories

## Guides & References

- [Style Gallery](https://mas-monograms.com/style-gallery/): Photos of finished embroidery work
- [Font & Lettering Guide](https://mas-monograms.com/font-lettering-guide/): Browse available embroidery fonts
- [Thread Color Chart](https://mas-monograms.com/thread-color-chart/): Full thread color library with DMC numbers

## More

- [About](https://mas-monograms.com/about/): Mary Ann's story and studio
- [Clearance](https://mas-monograms.com/clearance/): Ready-to-ship sale items

## Contact

- Email: via the quote form at https://mas-monograms.com/request-a-quote/
- Location: St. Matthews, SC
